attacking_style: Attacks from breakaways 1-2km from summit on Cat-1 climbs, systematically controlling intermediate KOM points before final acceleration. Prefers summit finishes where climbing endurance beats pure punch.
team_tactics: Dual role: wins from breaks when given freedom (Vuelta 2022), or provides high-tempo shredding on final climbs to set up UAE GC leaders (Giro 2023). Team grants autonomy in stage-hunting mode.
terrain_preference: Cat-1 mountain-top finishes in adverse conditions (fog, rain) where sustained climbing power dominates. Exposed on penultimate climbs in multi-mountain stages and technical descents where handling errors cost time.
vulnerability: Descent technical errors cost crucial time for GC leaders; accumulated fatigue limits consecutive breakthrough efforts; positioning lapses during service/clothing changes cause catastrophic time loss. Crash-prone in violent break formations.
key_patterns: Wins from breakaways by controlling all intermediate climbs before final attack, 3+ stage wins using this pattern.
Abandons Grand Tours after crashes, lost KOM lead 2022 Vuelta, crashed out 2023 Vuelta mid-race.
Excels in adverse weather: won in torrential rain and fog on Cat-1 finishes in 2022 Vuelta.
Technical descent mistakes cost UAE leaders critical seconds when in domestique role, multiple documented errors.
Dropped on penultimate climbs in multi-mountain stages, climbing endurance gap versus sustained efforts.
Prioritizes KOM points over stage wins when in polka dot jersey, tactical discipline for jersey competition.
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed strong early season (Romandie GC lead, Giro pacing duties) but crashes and illness forced Vuelta abandon. Mix of high-level performances and operational errors suggests established capability without clear upward trend.
